title: Purple Haze
why_this_song: Purple Haze by Jimi Hendrix (1967) — selected for the English-through-music catalog. Use the sing-along prompts and exercises to drill pronunciation, vocabulary, and listening comprehension.

vocab_hooks.note: Appears 9 times; first heard in: "Help me (help me)"
Appears 4 times; first heard in: "Purple haze all in my brain"
Appears 4 times; first heard in: "Purple haze all in my brain"
Appears 4 times; first heard in: "Lately, things just don't seem the same"
Appears 3 times; first heard in: "Actin' funny but I don't know why"

teaching_notes_md:
## Teaching notes

- Times are estimated from community-synced lyrics and may be off by 1–2 seconds.
- Start with the sing-along prompt, then move to listen-and-fill.
- For B1+ students, focus on the discussion questions.
copyright_notice: Short fair-use lyric excerpts only (Brazilian Lei 9.610/98 art. 46 VIII). No full lyrics stored.

exercises.prompt_en: How many times do you hear the word "help" in the whole song?
exercises.prompt_pt: Quantas vezes você ouve a palavra "help" na música inteira?

exercises.prompt_en: How many times do you hear the word "purple" in the whole song?
exercises.prompt_pt: Quantas vezes você ouve a palavra "purple" na música inteira?

exercises.prompt_en: Put these three lines in the order they appear in the song:
exercises.prompt_pt: Coloque estes três versos na ordem em que aparecem na música:

excerpts.text: Purple haze all in my brain

exercises.prompt_en: And these three — put them in the order they appear in the song:
exercises.prompt_pt: E estes três — coloque na ordem em que aparecem na música:

excerpts.text: Lately, things just don't seem the same
Don't know if it's day or night

exercises.prompt_en: Who in your life would you dedicate "Purple Haze" to, and what line captures what you want to say to them?
exercises.prompt_pt: Para quem da sua vida você dedicaria "Purple Haze", e qual verso resume o que você quer dizer para essa pessoa?

exercises.prompt_en: Compare "Purple Haze" with a Brazilian song you know. Do they share a theme? How do their styles differ?
exercises.prompt_pt: Compare "Purple Haze" com alguma música brasileira que você conhece. Elas compartilham algum tema? Como os estilos diferem?

exercises.prompt_en: If you could change the ending of the story told in "Purple Haze", what would happen instead?
exercises.prompt_pt: Se você pudesse mudar o final da história contada em "Purple Haze", o que aconteceria?

exercises.prompt_en: Write the full form of each contraction:
exercises.prompt_pt: Escreva a forma completa de cada contração:
